CustomField.description: When enabled, the system automatically generates approved service fee invoices upon approval of the rent invoices, applying the specified service fee percentage on the billed amount. Additionally, if intercompany functionality is enabled, the system will generate corresponding journal entries.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: When enabled, the system automatically generates approved service fee invoices upon approval of the rent invoices, applying the specified service fee percentage on the billed amount. Additionally, if intercompany functionality is enabled, the system will generate corresponding journal entries.
CustomField.label: Autocreate Service Fee Invoices?
